prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类最低位次依次约 13884→14729→16442→17238→15346 名，整体呈波动后移趋势；2024 年达到峰值 17238 后，2025 年明显回升至 15346 名，近 2 年波动幅度约 1892 名，2025 年基准约 15346 名；该校在重庆物理类招生计划：2021–2023 年均为 19 人，2024 年增至 31 人，2025 年 32 人；2026 年计划 34 人，较 2025 年小幅扩招约 6.3%，扩招使竞争略有加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜排名约第 75 名（2026 年），近年排名稳定在 63–75 名区间，属中上水平理工类院校；该校在近年声誉舆情监测中未出现明显负面或投档异常信号；抖音综合热度排名未进入前 106 名，关注度一般，报考热度无明显异常波动；第五轮学科评估数据中该校未单独收录，但该校以地质学、地质资源与地质工程为传统优势，相关学科在国内处于领先地位，对相关专业报考有稳定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等理工热门专业持续高热，对理工类院校整体报考热度有正向拉动；重庆 2026 年物理类考生估算约 13.7 万人，较 2025 年（13.9 万）略减约 1.9%，竞争略有缓和；省控线（物理类本科批）2025 年 425 分，近年波动不大；该校位于北京市，属一线城市高校，对重庆考生有较强地域吸引力；该校在重庆招生人数占其全国总招生比例约 2.5%（2025 年），属中等偏低水平。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动、2026 年计划小幅扩招（+6.3%）、物理类考生数略减（约-1.9%）以及学校层次与专业热度等因素，扩招带来的竞争加剧效应与考生数减少的缓和效应大致相抵，但考虑到 2025 年位次已明显回升且学校在北京的区位优势持续，预计 2026 年最低位次在 2025 年基准上小幅后移；预测最低位次约 15871 名，区间 15371–16371 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 13884 → 14729 → 16442 → 17238 → 15346, showing an overall fluctuating and shifting trend; after reaching a peak of 17238 in 2024, it significantly rebounded to 15346 in 2025, with a fluctuation range of about 1892 in the past two years, and the 2025 baseline is approximately 15346; the university's enrollment plan in Chongqing for Physics Category: 19 students each year from 2021 to 2023, increased to 31 in 2024, 32 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 34 students, a slight expansion of about 6.3% compared to 2025, which slightly intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 75th on the Soft Science China University Main Ranking (2026), with stable rankings in the 63–75 range in recent years, belonging to upper-middle level science and engineering institutions; no significant negative or abnormal admission signals have been detected in recent reputation monitoring; the comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking has not entered the top 106, with average attention and no abnormal fluctuations in application popularity; the fifth round of discipline evaluation data has not been separately included, but the university has traditional advantages in geology and geological resources and geological engineering, with related disciplines leading domestically, providing stable attraction for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular science and engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly sought after, positively driving the overall application popularity of science and engineering institutions; the estimated number of Physics Category candidates in Chongqing in 2026 is about 137,000, a slight decrease of about 1.9% compared to 2025 (139,000), easing competition slightly; the provincial control line (Physics Category undergraduate batch) was 425 points in 2025, with little fluctuation in recent years; the university is located in Beijing, a first-tier city, which has strong regional attraction for Chongqing candidates; the proportion of the university's enrollment in Chongqing to its total national enrollment is about 2.5% (2025), which is moderately low.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical ranking fluctuations, the slight expansion of the 2026 plan (+6.3%), the slight decrease in Physics Category candidates (about -1.9%), and factors such as university level and major popularity, the intensified competition effect from expansion and the easing effect from the decrease in candidates roughly offset each other. However, given that the 2025 ranking has significantly rebounded and the university's location advantage in Beijing persists, it is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will shift slightly backward based on the 2025 baseline; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 15871, with a range of 15371–16371.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 15871, range 15371–16371. Candidates within the range are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors (such as Geology Innovation Class, Geophysics, Geographic Information Science, etc.) as the main direction; Tier 1 popular majors (Computer Science, Software, AI) require a ranking significantly better than the lower limit of the range to attempt; Tier 3 traditional geology and mining majors can serve as safety choices. The university is a 211 science and engineering institution, with geology-related disciplines as traditional advantages, and employment directions mainly in energy, geology, mining, and engineering, suitable for candidates interested in these fields.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 75th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking, a mid-to-upper level science and engineering institution with few liberal arts majors; no obvious negative or abnormal admission signals in recent reputation monitoring; general popularity on Douyin is moderate, with no abnormal application heat; the fifth round of discipline evaluation data does not separately include this university, but it has traditional advantages in geology, while its liberal arts majors (English, Translation, Law, Business Administration, Natural Resources Registration and Management) are not its core advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law has high social popularity (recommended), foreign language majors have average popularity and are to be observed; the estimated number of History Category examinees in Chongqing in 2026 is about 72,000, a slight decrease of about 1.7% from 2025 (73,000), with slightly eased competition; the provincial control line (History Category undergraduate batch) was 438 points in 2025, with little fluctuation in recent years; the university is located in Beijing, which has strong regional appeal to Chongqing examinees; the number of History Category admissions is very small (only 6 in 2025), and even after expanding to 11 in 2026, it remains a niche choice.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as historical ranking fluctuations, the significant enrollment expansion in 2026 (+83.3%), a slight decrease in History Category examinees (about -1.7%), and the university level and major popularity, the large expansion is the dominant factor, which will significantly lower the ranking (increase the ranking number), and the mitigating effect of the slight decrease in examinees is insufficient to offset it; the predicted minimum ranking is about 4740, with a range of 4240–5240.
